title: MoreCroissant
description: Adds multiple edible croissants, craft flour to make croissant, then add your topping !
body:
**MoreCroissant first release !**
---------------------------------

### **This lightweight mod allows you to make croissants, but not only one kind !**

![MoreCroissant | Craft Basic Croissant (Flour, sugar, milk)](https://wsrv.nl/?url=https://i.ibb.co/pWt0wdt/craft-Croissant.gif&n=-1)

Feel free to add _**toppings to it**_, such as chocolate, berries, melon, and so on.

Such as hay bale, you can _**craft a croissant block**_ for decorative purposes.

Also, as an extra, discover the _**Croissant Sound Block. Behaving like a note block**_, you can play it directly or use redstone on it.

**How it works ?**
------------------

1 - Craft **flour**

![MoreCroissant | Craft Flour (3 wheats, water, egg)](https://wsrv.nl/?url=https://i.ibb.co/yFWJZwm/craft-Flour.gif&n=-1)

2 - Craft **basic Croissant**

![MoreCroissant | Craft Basic Croissant (Flour, sugar, milk)](https://wsrv.nl/?url=https://i.ibb.co/pWt0wdt/craft-Croissant.gif&n=-1)

3 - Add **topping**

Currently, there is 5 toppings.

**Apple Croissant (croissant with apple above)**

![MoreCroissant | Apple Croissant (apple, croissant)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1faeeb2964a5b28f16e84edeb621a30db9610149.png)

**Berries Croissant (croissant with sweet berries above)**

![MoreCroissant | Berries Croissant (berries, croissant)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f73931bdeb185b68b1137d4669fde8372090f765.png)

**Chocolate Croissant (croissant with cocoa beans above)**

![MoreCroissant | Chocolate Croissant (cocoa beans, croissant)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c50879e8eb18f4f1a45daaeb9a94432b6836b3b2.png)

**Melon Croissant (croissant with melon slice above)**

![MoreCroissant | Melon Croissant (melon slice, croissant)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8fc24e5769adf92d7ae6a4b9122721f033e9d253.png)

**Golden apple Croissant (croissant with golden apple above)**

_Gives Absorption for 45 seconds_

![MoreCroissant | Golden Apple Croissant (golden apple, croissant)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2b15dc19399f1a275665a1d55acc52aa7f9ebe7a.png)

4 - **Eat** & be happy

**Extra blocks**
----------------

1 - Croissant Block

You can _**craft a croissant block**_ for decorative purposes.

![MoreCroissant | Craft Croissant Block (9 croissants)](https://wsrv.nl/?url=https://i.ibb.co/sHWG2V6/craft-Croissant-Block.gif&n=-1)

2 - Croissant Sound Block

This block is not yet craftable but can be found in the creative menu.

Behave like a note block, except it has a special sound !

![MoreCroissant | Croissant Sound Block (special sound, and redstone friendly)](https://wsrv.nl/?url=https://i.ibb.co/2hxr1mr/croissant-sound-block.gif&n=-1)

**Disclaimer**
--------------

*   MoreCroissant could contain bugs and issues.
*   Please provide me feedback if you encounter any issues using it.
*   Feel free to contact me for any mod ideas or MoreCroissant improvements.
